INST1SD:
This test examines your ability to compare two patterns simultaneously. The computer will present two patterns of dots to you, side by side on the screen. You must decide, as quickly and accurately as possible, if the two patterns are the same. Press the space bar if the patterns match the condition shown. Once you press a key, the patterns will disappear, so it is important that you know your answer before you press.

Press any key to begin
FOOTERSAME: Press space bar if stimuli are THE SAME
FOOTERDIFF: Press space bar if stimuli are DIFFERENT
INSTMID: Now, we will reverse the instructions: Only press the space bar when the two patterns are DIFFERENT. Press any key to begin
DEBRIEF: Thank you for participating. Press any key to continue.
